description: American criminal street gang based in Los Angeles, California, composed mainly of Mexican Americans. Named after the Florence area of Los Angeles County and controlled by the Mexican Mafia. Involved in drug smuggling, murder, assault, robbery, and other crimes. Active since the 1930s with an estimated 2,000-3,000+ members.
